So at the start, it would be maybe once a week, uh, to every once , once a month, but now it's getting uh, uh, a couple of times a day. Right, OK. And, how long have these episodes been going on for? Uh, I've actually , got no idea. Right, OK. Um, well the, the way you're describing these episodes. They make me concerned about, mini-strokes or TIAs, , transient ischemic attacks. Um. OK . Now, if your symptoms return and they persist, they're prolonged . Then um, you may need to attend A and E. OK, because um, our presumptive, working diagnosis is , mini-stroke or TIA, OK.
